name: Crab Won Tons with Blackberry Szechwan Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. BLACKBERRY PUREE: Process fresh or thawed blackberries in a food mill, blender, or food processor until smooth. If desired, remove seeds by straining through a medium sieve and pressing pulp through with a rubber spatula. Add sugar to taste (about 2 tablespoons per cup of berries).
2. SZECHUAN SAUCE: Combine all sauce ingredients in a saucepan. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat, then lower the heat and cook until clear and thickened. The flavor improves after standing overnight.
3. FILLING: Remove stems from spinach and wash leaves. Cook in a large pan over medium-high heat until just beginning to wilt and most water has evaporated. Chop finely and set aside. Melt butter in a sauté pan, then cook onions until transparent. Add cream cheese chunks and blend with lemon juice when the cheese begins to soften. Stir in breadcrumbs, crab, and spinach.
4. WON TONS: Place 1-2 teaspoons of filling in each wrapper and seal according to package directions. Fry single layers of wontons in hot oil (about 1/4 inch deep) for 2-3 minutes until golden brown. Drain on paper bags or towels and serve with blackberry sauce immediately.
